description: Base L2 DeFi TVL tracking. Updated each RESEARCH scan.

snapshots.notes: Base at 46% of L2 DeFi TVL market. Morpho near $2B on Base driven by Coinbase Bitcoin-backed loans. Aero merger Q2 2026 on track.
Morpho Base TVL low point April 2025. By March 2026 it is nearly 3x.
Morpho Base TVL at $60M July 2024. 30x growth in 20 months.

drivers: Ecosystem expansion via Coinbase developer tools
trends.lever_implication: LEVER launching on Base mainnet targets the highest-TVL L2 environment. Morpho V2 integration (lvUSDT as collateral) is high-priority given $1.8B TVL on Base. ERC-4626 standard positions LEVER perfectly for Coinbase integration (same model as Morpho).
